# expo-callkit-telecom

> CallKit and Core-Telecom for React Native and Expo — VoIP push, incoming call UI, LiveKit-friendly audio. A modern react-native-callkeep alternative.

`expo-callkit-telecom` is an Expo module (Swift + Kotlin) that wraps Apple's CallKit on iOS and Jetpack `androidx.core-telecom` on Android behind one typed TypeScript API. The module owns the system call UI, the audio session, and VoIP push parsing; the host app owns the media (LiveKit, plain WebRTC, etc.). An Expo config plugin handles entitlements, background modes, microphone permission, ringtone bundling, and FCM service registration at prebuild time.

Minimum platforms: iOS 15.1, Android API 26. Verified end-to-end on iOS 26 + Android 15 with Expo SDK 55, React Native 0.83, the New Architecture enabled, and the LiveKit React Native SDK.

## Docs

- [Overview](https://mfairley.github.io/expo-callkit-telecom/): features, supported versions, and authoritative references for CallKit, Core-Telecom, VoIP push, and LiveKit.
- [Getting started](https://mfairley.github.io/expo-callkit-telecom/getting-started): install, config plugin setup, the request/report/fulfill mental model, and VoIP push registration.
- [VoIP push payload](https://mfairley.github.io/expo-callkit-telecom/voip-push): canonical `IncomingCallEvent` shape, APNs VoIP (PushKit) payload, and FCM data-message payload.
- [Platform notes](https://mfairley.github.io/expo-callkit-telecom/platform-notes): iOS / Android requirements and background keep-alive guidance.
- [vs react-native-callkeep](https://mfairley.github.io/expo-callkit-telecom/vs-callkeep): side-by-side comparison, when to pick which, and migration sketch.
- [API reference](https://mfairley.github.io/expo-callkit-telecom/api/): generated TypeScript reference for sessions, requests, reporters, fulfillers, events, audio, capture, VoIP push, hooks, and permissions.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/mfairley/expo-callkit-telecom)
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/expo-callkit-telecom)
